# currentDate
Today's date is 2026-03-19.

# Genome Analysis Project

## Sample

- **Sample ID:** GFXC087577
- **Source:** Dante Labs whole genome sequencing
- **Original build:** GRCh37/hg19 (Dante Labs callset)
- **Target build:** GRCh38 (DeepVariant re-analysis)
- **Total variants:** ~5.2M (GRCh37), ~4.5-5.5M expected (GRCh38)

## Re-Analysis Pipeline

6-phase pipeline: HPC setup -> FASTQ staging -> nf-core/raredisease -> artifact triage -> IGV validation -> clinical report.

**Status:** Phases 1-3 complete. Pipeline completed successfully 14-Mar-2026 01:22 (1d 13h 10m, 62 processes, 316.4 CPU hours). Results at `/rds/general/user/nskene/home/GenomeAnalysis/results/` on CX3.

**VEP annotation:** Standalone VEP with 5 plugins (CADD, LOFTEE, SpliceAI, AlphaMissense, REVEL) run separately from pipeline. Initial whole-genome job killed at 8h walltime (only chr1-6 annotated, 2,134,432 records). Now uses per-chromosome parallelization: 24 PBS jobs × 4h walltime each. Run `run_vep_parallel.sh` to submit, `merge_vep.sh` to combine. Phases 4-6 (triage, validation, report) scripts ready, not yet run against raredisease output.

## Files

### GRCh37 (Original)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `genome.vcf.gz` | Original VCF from Dante Labs (no rsIDs) |
| `genome.vcf.gz.tbi` | Tabix index for original VCF |
| `genome.rsid.vcf.gz` | rsID-annotated VCF (current primary) |
| `genome.rsid.vcf.gz.tbi` | Tabix index for annotated VCF |
| `00-All.vcf.gz` | dbSNP b151 full reference (~15GB) |
| `00-All.vcf.gz.tbi` | dbSNP tabix index |

### GRCh38 (Re-analysis)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `grch38/genome.grch38.vcf.gz` | DeepVariant VCF (from nf-core pipeline) |
| `grch38/genome.grch38.vep.vcf.gz` | VEP-annotated VCF (standalone VEP with CADD+LOFTEE+SpliceAI+AlphaMissense+REVEL) |

### Polygenic Risk Scores

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `prs_results.json` | Pre-computed PRS results (generated by process_prs_results.py) |
| `pgs_population_stats.json` | Cached scoring file stats for z-score computation |
| `process_prs_results.py` | Parse pgsc_calc output + enrich with trait metadata + z-scores |
| `hpc/pgscalc.config` | Nextflow config: PBS Pro executor + memory escalation for pgsc_calc |
| `hpc/run_pgscalc_all.sh` | Single pgsc_calc invocation (Nextflow handles job scheduling) |
| `hpc/prep_prs_inputs.sh` | Create autosomal VCF + extract remaining IDs + validate samplesheet |
| `hpc/prs_batch.sh` | Status/concat utilities (batch submission DEPRECATED) |
| `hpc/run_pgscalc.sh` | Legacy single-batch launcher (kept for reference) |
| `hpc/prs_samplesheet.csv` | pgsc_calc v2.2.0 samplesheet (path_prefix format) |
| `hpc/download_pgs_ids.py` | Fetch all PGS IDs from PGS Catalog API |

### HPC Pipeline

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `hpc/nextflow.config` | Imperial HPC PBS Pro + Apptainer config |
| `hpc/samplesheet.csv` | nf-core/raredisease singleton input |
| `hpc/setup_hpc.sh` | One-time HPC environment setup |
| `hpc/download_fastq.sh` | BAM/FASTQ download from Dante Labs |
| `hpc/bam2fastq.sh` | PBS job: BAM to paired FASTQ extraction |
| `hpc/stage_references.sh` | Reference genome + annotation staging |
| `hpc/run_pipeline.sh` | nf-core/raredisease launch script |
| `hpc/run_vep.sh` | VEP annotation (whole-genome or per-chromosome via CHR var) |
| `hpc/run_vep_parallel.sh` | Submit 24 per-chromosome VEP jobs in parallel |
| `hpc/merge_vep.sh` | Merge per-chr VEP results + verify variant counts |
| `hpc/monitor.sh` | Job monitoring helper |

### Triage Engine

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `triage/vcfanno.toml` | vcfanno config (segdups, LCR, gnomAD) |
| `triage/slivar_filters.js` | Artifact detection + tiering JS expressions |
| `triage/run_triage.sh` | Orchestration: vcfanno -> slivar -> tiering |
| `triage/kosmos_check.sh` | Known artifact comparison (SON, SCARF2, etc.) |

### Panels

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `panels/oligodontia.json` | 8-gene oligodontia/ectodermal dysplasia panel (GRCh38) |
| `panels/pigmentation.json` | 10-gene pigmentation panel (GRCh38) |
| `panels/acmg_sf_v3.3.json` | 81-gene ACMG v3.3 secondary findings |

### Validation + Report

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `validation/extract_minibam.sh` | Mini-BAM extraction for IGV validation |
| `validation/run_igv_reports.sh` | igv-reports HTML generation |
| `validation/validation_checklist.py` | Interactive variant validation CLI |
